experiment: Feature Sufficiency Criterion (FSC) values for tab:fsc_values
note: Backs Appendix Table tab:fsc_values. Each row aggregates the canonical sae_alignment.json output of behavioral_channels.py for the per-model analysis layer fixed in tab:model_details. The per-row n_cf_features and fsc_K_cf values mirror the canonical disk values; the paper-cited columns (paper_*) are the manuscript-rendered values. The verifier asserts that disk equals paper to within 0.001 across all eight rows.
